offer: For accounting firms managing 10-50 clients, compliance document mismanagement causes missed deadlines. We digitize files and track regulatory changes instead of manual tracking and filing systems.
problem: Difficulty in tracking regulatory changes and managing compliance documents efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where accounting firms seek advice
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try digitization and tracking on 1-3 documents
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
